ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded energy consumption data */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the building */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "heating" REAL /* Energy consumed for heating (in BTU) */,
  "cooling_ventilation" REAL /* Energy consumed for cooling and ventilation (in BTU) */,
  "envelope" REAL /* Energy consumed for building envelope (in BTU) */,
  "lighting" REAL /* Energy consumed for lighting (in BTU) */,
  "appliances" REAL /* Energy consumed by appliances (in BTU) */,
  "other" REAL /* Energy consumed for other uses (in BTU) */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed (sum of all categories) */,
  "energy_efficiency_score" REAL /* Calculated energy efficiency score */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "energy_source_id", "building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, client) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., BTU, kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Year of the recorded energy consumption data
Energy consumed for cooling and ventilation (in BTU)
Energy consumed for building envelope (in BTU)
Energy consumed for other uses (in BTU)
Total energy consumed (sum of all categories)
Total square footage of the building
Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial)
Contact phone number for the organization
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, client)
User ID of the user who created the report
Timestamp when the report was created
Timestamp when the report was last updated
